race.comment: HATOS (8) is deserving of a change of fortunes after placing last three starts including over course and distance on soft ground in January. This sounder surface should be appreciated and looks to have a big chance. Another runner due a change of luck is GORCOMBE MOONSHINE (9) who was narrowly denied into second at Fontwell Park this month. Must be taken very seriously. KITSILANO (2) now has a visor fitted for the first time after finishing fourth here during March when well held. Not ruled out. A LITTLE SOMETHING (7) remains a maiden after eleven attempts. Offered promise managing second last time. Player.
